base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of patra_ring_orbit — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Patra — sphinx-eye with ring of orbiting small-patras. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Patra — sphinx-eye with ring of orbiting small-patras; 2-frame central-eye pulse. Small ring-eyes must be killed first to expose central. Boss of Level 8
